---
title: "Naming Conventions"
---

Certain conventions should be followed when implementing this structure so that the app can be easily collaborated on by other developers.

### Python code
For general code formatting, follow the [Python Enhancement Proposals (PEP 8)](https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/).

### Shiny code
For Shiny specifically, see below:

Top-level Nav Panels: The name of the page with the *ui* suffix in snake_case (`my_ui`)\
Top-level Page Modules: The name of the page with the *module* suffix in snake_case (`my_module`)\
Global state object: Named `state` in both the module function call and body\
Optional module state: Named `module`\
